# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

---
services:
  - name: users-api
    url: users-service:8080

  - name: orders-api
    url: orders-service:8081

routes:
  - name: users-route
    paths:
      - /users
    service: users-api

  - name: orders-route
    paths:
      - /orders
    service: orders-api

plugins:
  - name: load-balancer
    config:
      balance: round-robin

upstreams:
  - name: users-service
    targets:
      - target: users-service:8080

  - name: orders-service
    targets:
      - target: orders-service:8081
